title: Mod Checker Reworked
description: Mod Checker Reworked is a mod that ensures the presence of certain mods in your modpack.
body:
![The main font... ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb7b92387730754d2a45e1db2538711fa76215d0.png)

Mod Checker Reworked is a mod that ensures that you can use popular mods(that are not on modrinth) in your modpack. You can configuer the mods in a config file! If any of these mods are missing, the mod displays a screen before entering the main menu, showing that you need to download the mods.

I got the idea for this mod from the [FTB Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/ftbchecker) mod. However, I did not use any code from this mod. Everything is programmed by myself. 

⚠️ Mod Checker Reworked is not affiliated with or endorsed by any mod displayed in the gui or Modrinth. ⚠️
